description: A research scientist needs to design a protocol for a new preclinical toxicology study in rats.

nodes.task_description: Define the study objectives, such as determining the maximum tolerated dose (MTD).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly states the primary objective of the study.

nodes.task_description: Select the animal model, dose levels, and duration of the study.

expected_outcome.value: Agent designs a study with 4 dose groups (including control) to be run for 28 days.

nodes.task_description: Define the study endpoints, including clinical observations, body weights, and terminal histopathology.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a comprehensive list of all data points to be collected.

nodes.task_description: Draft the study protocol document and submit it for review by the Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes the full protocol and submits it for ethical review.
